text:
Simone Biles leads USA to first women’s gymnastics gold in team final, Italy finish second and Brazil third.

Save

Share

This page is now closed. Thanks for joining us. These were the updates as Team USA took gold in the women’s artistic gymnastics at Paris 2024 on Tuesday, July 30:
